heading: Streamlined critical pay authority
label: 9503 Streamlined critical pay authority
notes: References in TextThe provisions of this title governing appointments in the competitive service, referred to in subsec. (a), are classified generally to section 3301 et seq. of this title.

children.label: A
children.text: require expertise of an extremely high level in an administrative, technical, or professional field; and

children.label: B
children.text: are critical to the Internal Revenue Service’s successful accomplishment of an important mission;
exercise of the authority is necessary to recruit or retain an individual exceptionally well qualified for the position;
the number of such positions does not exceed 40 at any one time;
designation of such positions are approved by the Secretary of the Treasury;
the terms of such appointments are limited to no more than 4 years;
appointees to such positions were not Internal Revenue Service employees prior to ;June 1, 1998
total annual compensation for any appointee to such positions does not exceed the highest total annual compensation payable at the rate determined under ; andsection 104 of title 3
all such positions are excluded from the collective bargaining unit.

children.label: b
children.text: Individuals appointed under this section shall not be considered to be employees for purposes of subchapter II of chapter 75.
